name: nsip
description: NSIP sheep genetic evaluation MCP server -- search animals, compare EBVs, plan matings, check inbreeding, and analyze flocks using the National Sheep Improvement Program database.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for animals in the NSIP database with filters for breed, gender, status, date range, flock, and sorting.

tools.name: details
tools.description: Get detailed EBV data, breed, contact info, and status for a specific animal by LPN ID.

tools.name: lineage
tools.description: Get pedigree / ancestry tree for a specific animal including parents and grandparents.

tools.name: progeny
tools.description: Get paginated list of offspring for a specific animal.

tools.name: profile
tools.description: Get complete profile for an animal: details, pedigree, and offspring in one call.

tools.name: breed_groups
tools.description: List all breed groups and individual breeds in the NSIP database.

tools.name: trait_ranges
tools.description: Get min/max EBV trait ranges for a specific breed.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare 2-5 animals side-by-side on their EBV traits.

tools.name: rank
tools.description: Rank animals within a breed by weighted EBV traits.

tools.name: inbreeding_check
tools.description: Calculate Wright's coefficient of inbreeding for a potential sire-dam mating.

tools.name: mating_recommendations
tools.description: Find optimal mates for an animal with inbreeding checks and trait complementarity ranking.

tools.name: flock_summary
tools.description: Summarize a flock's animals: count, gender breakdown, and average EBV traits.

tools.name: database_status
tools.description: Get NSIP database last-updated date and available animal statuses.
